title: Garbage | No Gods No Masters | Out Now

images.alt:
“Sex Is Not The Enemy” touches on the Bush administration’s efforts to roll back gay rights, reproductive rights, the civil liberties of the American people and the rise of the moral right wing in the U.S. 

Music Video directed by the great Sophie Muller.

Listen to it on ‘Anthology’.

Be Here.
Reposted courtesy of the wonderfully wise and beautifully brilliant @yrsadaleyward .

Check out @butchvigmusic on the Too Much Effing Perspective Podcast. 
Link in bio

Shivers up and down my spine
Feet to the deep
Inside this big, bright world
“Big Bright World”, the second single from our fifth album ‘Not Your Kind Of People’.
Directed by Julie Oscar
Available on ‘Anthology’
I will never EVER get over how cool Butch and Duke look in this photo.

Vow. The very first single and accompanying video for our debut album, the eponymously titled ‘Garbage’. 
Shooting this video in Los Angeles was the first time we as a band ever performed live together. The rest as they say, is history. 
Directed by our dear Samuel Bayer.
Listen to “Vow” on ‘Anthology’.

“I think I’m Paranoid” was the second single lifted from ‘Version 2.0’.
The music video was shot by amazing fashion photographer and director Matthew Rolston. 
Available now on “Anthology”.

This photograph was taken minutes after I fell off a rotating stage at the @KROQ weenie roast back in 2016 where I badly injured my right hip.
Over the last 6 years it has caused me so much pain and impairment that my doctor has advised me to get a new hip. I am scheduled for surgery in the very early new year and I simply cannot wait. Meanwhile, all of you who have expressed concern at the sight of me using a cane, be rest assured that all will be well in a matter of months.
I look forward to touring again with a healthy body. The last two years have been very difficult for me indeed. So watch out everyone. I will be in rude health before you know it and like a phoenix , I will rise again……
There is something you should know……
